denominator_used: N = 54 (WES cohort; all samples with WES == 'X' in MOESM4).
assumptions_made: Non-synonymous defined as Missense_Mutation, Nonsense_Mutation, Frame_Shift_Del/Ins, In_Frame_Del/Ins, Splice_Site, Nonstop_Mutation, Translation_Start_Site; FILTER == 'PASS' required; a sample is counted as NOTCH1-mutated if it has at least one qualifying NOTCH1 variant; denominator = 54 regardless of whether the sample has any MAF rows.
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
- MOESM4 'Clinical Data': 108 rows, WES label column indicates WES participation; filtered to WES == 'X' -> 54 unique WES samples.
- MOESM5 'Supplementary Table 2' (MAF): 7457 rows.
- WES cohort barcodes constructed as 'Tumor_' + WES label -> 54 unique barcodes.

B. COHORT DEFINITION
- Step 1: WES samples where WES == 'X' -> N=54 samples.
- Step 2: MAF restricted to Tumor_Sample_Barcode in the 54 WES cohort barcodes -> 6621 rows, 49 distinct samples with any MAF row.

C. VARIABLE CODING
- Gene: Hugo_Symbol == 'NOTCH1'.
- Non-synonymous classifications considered: Missense_Mutation, Nonsense_Mutation, Frame_Shift_Del, Frame_Shift_Ins, In_Frame_Del, In_Frame_Ins, Splice_Site, Nonstop_Mutation, Translation_Start_Site.
- Quality filter: FILTER == 'PASS'.

D. COMPUTATION
- Filter MAF rows to (Variant_Classification in non-syn set) AND (FILTER == 'PASS') -> 4508 rows.
- Subset to Hugo_Symbol == 'NOTCH1' -> 4 rows.
- Count distinct Tumor_Sample_Barcode among NOTCH1 rows = 4.
- Denominator = total WES cohort = 54.
- Frequency = 4/54 = 7.41%.

E. RESULT
- NOTCH1 mutation frequency in 54-sample WES cohort: 4/54 = 7.41% (rounded to whole-number percent: 7%).
- Paper reports 7% (=~4/54).

F. CAVEATS
- Non-syn set follows standard MAF convention; silent and non-coding classifications were excluded.
- Denominator = 54 WES samples (all samples in cohort, including those without any NOTCH1 mutation).
- Only rows with FILTER == 'PASS' are considered mutated (artifact/low-quality variants excluded).
